name: Mostima (Arknights)
description: Mostima is an enigmatic and elusive employee of Penguin Logistics. With extensive knowledge of Terra's geography and customs, she reveals secret facts about different places. Her calm demeanor and wry smile rarely waver, earning her the reputation of being a "black box." Her unique abilities and mysterious past make her a captivating and formidable presence.
creator: Skadi'sHusband648
